titleStmt.title: SII 27.185: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 185. (A.R. No. 599 of 1929-30.) HANDĀḌI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 3) set up in the prākāra of Heggaḍe Gōpālakṛishṇa temple.
This is dated Śaka 1465 (current), Śubhakṛit, Bhādrapada śu. 1, Friday, solar eclipse corresponding to 1542 A.D., August 11, Friday, f.d.t. ·06.

It registers a gift of lands for worship and offerings in the matha attached to the temple of Gōpinātha by Śaṅkaraliṅga-seṭṭi and Mahāliṅga-seṭṭi, descendants of Saṅku-heggaḍe who had the temple built, in Handāḍi, an adhivāsa of the village Brahmūru. Achchappavoḍeya is stated to have been governing Bārakūru-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ śrī sarasvatyai namaḥ nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra
cāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudayakara śālivāhana śakavaru
ṣa 1464 saṁdu Ayidaneya varttamānada śubhakrutu saṁvatsarada bhādrapada śuddha 1 lu śukravāra sūryyagrahaṇa
puṁṇyakāladalu śrīmanmahārāja rājādhiparamēśvara śrīvīra pratāpa veṁkaṭādrirāya mahārāyaru vijeyanagara siṁhā
sanadali yiddu sukharājyaṁgeyiva kāladalu Ā rāyara nirūpadiṁda Accappa voḍeyaru bārakūra siṁhāsanavanāḷuva kāladalli ba
rada śilāśāsanadakramaveṁteṁdare braṁhmara grāmada haṁdāḍiya Adhivāsadali kōṭekēriya mābuseṭṭaḷiya saṁku heggaḍeyaru kaṭṭi
sida dēvālayada śrī gōpinātha dēvara divyaśrī pādapadmaṁgaḷa saṁnidhiyalli kaṭṭida yeraḍu maṭhadalliU Ā dēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōga
Ā caṁdrārkkavāgi naḍavaṁtāgi sahiraṁṇyōdaka dāna (dāna) dhāradattavāgi Ā saṁkuheggaḍeyaramoṁma ru seṭṭiya
ḷiṁdiru śaṁkaraliṁga seṭṭiyaru Avarakūḍaṇa tāyamakkaḷu nāluvaru saha
vāgi dhāreyaneṟadu biṭabāḷu Akkiya vivara teṁka Oṁdu Ajarāḍiya doḷamāḍidalli Akki mu 14 sālabaḷiyara dharma
kana bageya mūḍagaddegaḷanalli mu 9 hoṁnappa bittuvagadde mu 3 taḷiyaṁṇuva bage mu 11 hosabuseṭṭi nāraṇana bage mūṟu
huliganamalli gadde mu 1 voḍeyaḍi gadde mu 7 biḍiraḍi gadde mu 6 Ajjarāḍi hiriya gadde mu 12 rāmauṁgurapaḷliya kaṁ
baḷa gade na mallagadde makki saha mu 25 sūriyana voḷa mūḍu bayalagadde sahamu 7 marāḷuvana bagegadde mu 12 jitāra
kāḷiya mādanabage kaṁnaṁpaḷi bagesaha mu 7 mattaṁ haṁdāḍimūle kēśana tāṟu kēśana mane muṁdaṇagadde saha mu 12 . Ajarāḍi
ya beṭṭina mūḍaṇa gade kēśana gaddeya baḍagaṇagadde dēvālyada baḍagaṇagadde saha mu 13 . kekuḍeya mane mallagadde mu 4 taṁmya
ṇa bittuva gadde mu 2 . yibyana bage mu 12 basavaseṭṭi voḷamāḍu mu 32 kāḍapaḷi mu 10 marada keṟiya baḍagaṇa gaddeya
lli mu 10 kecaṇana bage mu 25 Ā bage dēvālyada hiṁdaṇagade mu 6 hasuri bage mu 3 gejeyaṇaseṭi bage voḷamāri
nalli mu 40 teṁkabeyisiriyakka bhaṁḍāriti bage mu 4 voraṁbaḷi Adhivāsa purāṇada bage mu 28 dudura bā
ḷa māḍinalli mu 12 gāvaḷitiya voḷamūḍi nalli mu 21 . koṭhāritiya maneya mūḍalu talaseyakaḷu bittuva
voḷamāḍu mu 3 . 6 kojibāḷu bage dudurabāḷu mu 6 mattaṁ Ābage kuduranabāḷu mu 15 . beṁṇakudi
Alibehāri bage ceṁmaṁcaniṁda mu 23 śaṁkara vayidyana gōviṁdaniṁda gujārabage mu 7 . maṁjanabage mu 6
gaṇapaucanabage mu 60 kāmavaidyana gōviṁdana bāḷumukha taṁgāḍiti gōviṁdaseṭi bage baḷigeṟi vottina bā
ḷu mu 8 . mukuṁbara kaṭu māḷaca bhaṁḍāri mu 16 kalinagadde mu 4 dattada gōviṁdana bage mākavamallana gadde mu 2
mattaṁ beṁṇikuduralli gujārarabage mu 5 . Aṁṇavoraṁbaḷi bage haneṁṭigadde hoḷe sahavā
gi mu 4 sarasvati gōviṁdana voḷamāḍu maneṁṭi saha mu 3 śaṁkara vaidyana gōḷiyaḍi gadde mu 5 kuṁñi
nāraṇanagōviṁdaniṁda mu 10 Ā bage kaṁmāṟa māḷa bittuva gaddemu 5 Ālakeṟiya mēlaṇagadde Aṁ
ṇa peraṇaniṁda mu 16 hoḷati bage Araḷiyaḍiya gadde mu 4 Adhikāriya bage mu 3 pohaḷi
Udaniṁda mu 3 saṁkara heraṇaniṁda mu 3 . 4 Aṁṇṇappavaidyana gōviṁdana bāḷu mu 3 . 16 derāḷuvaḷa bage bā
ḷu dugāḷupaniṁda mu 4 haneyaniṁda mu 3 . 5 gaṇavoḍana saṁtānadavariṁda mu 10 śivapavoraṁbaḷi yi
ṁda mu 9 koṭadakkena bāḷu mu 9 vojana tāṟu maṁjuviṁda mu 16 tiṁmmayya seṭṭibage mābuva maneya
paḍuvatāṟu mu 20 tiṁmayaseṭṭi māḍida dharmake nerakama koṭhāriti yiṁda mu 4 ... hosabeṭṭe bermaliṁ mu 3
pakuḍiya śaṁkarabhaṭṭakṛṣṇabhaṭṭaniṁda mu 2 hā 7 Aṁṇamabhaṭṭaniṁda mu 2 ... yīsara bhaṭṭana gōviṁ
da nāraṇaniṁda mu 3 . 3 viṣṇōraṁbaḷiyariṁda mu 2 . paḍuvaṇabāgi rāmamayyara maga śaṁkara mayani
ṁda paḍuva bayalabāḷu mu 12 Aṁṇavoraṁbaḷiyara bage mūḍamaneya mayyaniṁda mu 20 kṛṣṇa
mayaniṁda mu 10 śivaṇamayaniṁda mu 4 bācaṇamayana maganiṁda mu 4 kōḍina yīsarasaniṁda ko
ḷaṁbeya gadde mu 2 Upādhyaraṁṇana bāḷu mu 10 kociṭi saṁkuseṭi bage koḷaṁbegadde mu 6 baikā
ḍi baḍagamaneya kuṁjattana gadde saha mu 9 teṁkamaneya kuṁjattana bāḷu mu 2 . yośva
ra kaṁṇārana bāḷu mu 6 . va bage bayala gadde vogarahaḷi saha mu 6 . yeṁṇeya gadde mu 20
saṁkhayamala gadde tōṭa mu 5 kellanāraṇāḷuvana vadda bāḷu mu 10 tiṁmayyana huṇisegadde mu 6
rāmakudurana bāḷu rāmēśara dēvara keṟiya paḍuvabaḷigadde mu 7 mūdiṭi Aṁtahākida bāḷu kuṁjatta
ḷa kayali koṁḍa huṭinabāḷu mu 8 gaṁṭheya kallagadde mu 1 . Aṁṇakudurana mane bāḷinalli mu 3
mattaṁ baganahāḷi Akki mu 3 bayakāḍi yīsara kaṁṇārana bagegadde Akki mu 2 bokapaṭa
ṇa seṭi yeṁtaseṭi mallagadde tōṭa bāḷu saha Akki mu 20 honakuḷa narasiṁga seṭiya bobbariga
na gadde Akki mu 6 . narasiṁga seṭiya hosamāṭama 5 tōṭadalli Ayiroḍiyalli keṣadeya hitti
lagadde mu 17 handāḍi koḷakke gade Aṁṇu haḍuvaḷa nāruviṁda mu 1 Aṁtipi rāmaṇa bituvasāla
Aṁṇiseṭiya maneya mūḍasāla baḷiyagadde Akki mu 11 paḍuva cagi Upādhyahaṇana
bage koṁñama baraṁbaḷi bituva gade mu 7 yīsara nāyara mudda bittuva koḷake gadde mu 6 Āṁ
tu nānābage sahavāgi Akki mu 855 yī yeṁṭunūṟayivatta Ayidu muḍi Akkiya bāḷa
mūladamūla Āruvārada Artha yivaṟalli Uṁṭāda sarvasvadalli Artha baṁdarū Uratibaṁdarū śrīgōpī
nātha dēvarige yeṁdu barasida dharmaśilāśāsana yī śāsanadalli baradakke dēvara Amṛtapaḍi parva Aṁgaraṁga
bhōga yeraḍu maṭhadalli naḍava dharma A du saha Uṁba brāhmaṇajana 24 ke khajāya pāyasa śanivāra
yeṁṇeyiṣṭū Ā caṁdrārkkavāgi naḍavaṁtāgi biṭṭa sarvasva yī dēvara sarvasvadalli nāru seṭṭiyara
saṁtānada nālvaru tāyamakaḷoḷage Ārobaru tamage Akkalekapālu Uṁṭeṁdu vobaseṭege voṁdu kē
riyahalarige voṁdu nāḍa balāḷugaḷu daivadēvarige koṭṭare Ānapālina sarvasva Akaleka yēnuṁṭāda
rū gōpīnātha dēvarige haravari Avaru baḷi kuṭuṁbadiṁdalū mūru baḷiyiṁdalū hoṟage
yidaṟa vicārake mābuseṭhiya baḷi dēviyara baḷi nāḍuna baḷi yī mūṟu baḷi kartaru yemeṁdu
śaṁkaraliṁga seṭiyaru Avaru kūḍaṇa tāyamakkaḷu nāruseṭi tirumaṇaseṭi muṁtā
davaru mahāliṁgaseṭi Avara kuḍaṇa tāyimakaḷu liṁgaseṭi sōmayaseṭi rājaseṭi
mākuseṭi tiṁmaṇaseṭi muṁtāda heṁṇugaṁḍu samastarū voppi biṭṭa sarvasva barasida
śāsana yi dēvarige biṭṭa sarvasva hoṟatāgi yi nālaru tāyamakkaḷoḷage tamage baṁ
da Akaleka yēnuṁṭādadanu baddhakālakke tāve bāḷuvaru hākidare gōpīnātha dēvarige hā
kuvarallade muttārigū koḍa saladu yī śāsanada vakhaṇege Ārobaru tappidare vāraṇāsiyali
sāvira gōvakoṁda pātakake hōharu . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāsrēyōnrupālanaṁ . dā
nā svarggamavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdha
rā . ṣaṣṭirvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
